name: ares-harness
description: ARES harness — a portable SWE R&D agent harness for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and OpenCode. Keeps the current MISHKAN organization model while installing target-native agents, skills, commands, MCP, and knowledge tooling.

scripts.check: npm run check:layout && npm run check:cli && npm run check:runtimes && npm run check:hooks && npm run check:ingest && npm run check:work-store && npm run check:curated && npm run check:observability && npm run check:compose && npm run check:docs && npm run check:packlist && npm run check:package
scripts.postpack: echo 'ARES/MISHKAN packed. Install: npx ares-harness install --target codex (legacy aliases: mishkan, mishkan-harness)'

author: mibienpanjoe
